notes: Repo-authored subject-centric descriptor candidates derived from local audit hints. This file does not copy source rows or reference scores. Runtime selection requires both the config gate and descriptor-level mode to be active.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Existing repo-style subject gaze descriptor useful for restrained or subdued states.
descriptors.risk_note: Keep as eye behavior, not image-control wording.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Turns curiosity into subject expression instead of scene mood.
descriptors.risk_note: Semantic behavior only; avoid broad rendering-control wording.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Stable low-arousal expression descriptor already aligned with repo wording.
descriptors.risk_note: Use as candidate signal only; do not replace the emotion model wholesale.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Subject-centric mouth expression that stays concise and semantic.
descriptors.risk_note: Avoid overuse in active mode; keep under repetition guard.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Provides a gentle personality bridge without relying on style terms.
descriptors.risk_note: Keep as subtle expression, not as a moral judgment.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Useful calm body-expression candidate for low-pressure contexts.
descriptors.risk_note: Reject in active or high-pressure action contexts before adoption.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Rewrites a hand-to-face signal into a safe subject gesture.
descriptors.risk_note: Avoid sensual or body-emphasis usage; context filtering is required before active adoption.

descriptors.rewrite_reason: Useful restrained expression for awkward or amused affect.
descriptors.risk_note: Keep as facial expression; avoid style or color drift.
